title: Milarepa: Song in the Snow Cave
description: Milarepa sings in a cave during a blizzard, his cotton robe his only covering: inner heat conquers outer cold.
introduction: Milarepa sings in a cave during a blizzard, his cotton robe his only covering: inner heat conquers outer cold.

translation.original_text: In this cave on the snow mountain, I Milarepa am happy. The cold wind of winter is my bellows.
